text:
Created attachment 237931
VirtualBox log

* No data is being sent/received
* dhclient never exits
* ifconfig prints data up to and including "ether:" line and hangs

VirtualBox & host versions: see log

Network type: Bridged

Doesn't work on:
* 12.3-RELEASE
* 12.4-RC1

Works on:
* 13.1-RELEASE
